verification_gate: The phase is decomposed into bounded database-authority and source-owner tasks covering the complete user-space model, lossless ingestion, embeddings, semantic edits, transient and cognitive stores, direct LifeOS access, deterministic projection, portable builds, parity, recovery, and authority cutover without capability loss.
proof_summary: LIFEOS-002 (PostgreSQL-first user-space foundation proven) is complete because all 2 child tasks are complete with passing proofs: POSTGRES-001, FOUNDATION-001. This roll-up aggregates its children's proofs; no additional product execution was performed at this level.
